full_text: Rabada to Kohli, Axar Run Out!! Direct hit at the non-striker's end and South Africa are celebrating. What was Axar doing there? Sloppy running from him and he's a few inches short of the ground. Back of a length delivery down leg, Kohli misses and it goes off his thigh pad to the left of de Kock. Axar comes down looking for a single when it's clearly not on, but he does have the time to make it back home if he charges back immediately. However, he doesn't expect the throw to come at his end and is slow to turn around. De Kock catches him by surprise. A superb knock ends in clumsy fashion.

full_text: Rabada to Suryakumar Yadav, Caught by Klaasen!! South Africa are absolutely pumped as they've picked up a third wicket in the powerplay! This is a sensational start now as SKY makes his way back to the pavilion as well. A length delivery on off-stump, Suryakumar Yadav shuffled across a touch and picked it up before pulling it away towards deep backward square leg, didn't look like he put everything into it, it was hit into the wind and it floated down to Klaasen who was there, he ran to his left and tumbled before taking it low. Another great catch and South Africa know the value of that wicket.

full_text: Maharaj to Pant, Caught by de Kock!! Pant had a sheepish look on his face as soon as South Africa went up in appeal and he's gone for a duck! Dream start for South Africa, they've got rid of Pant as well. This was floated up full just outside off, Pant leant in looking to sweep and ended up taking it on the full, it hit the cue end of the bat and lobbed up, simple catch for QDK as it looped over him and landed just behind the stumps. The sweep has led to the downfall of both Rohit and Pant now.

full_text: Maharaj to Rohit, Caught by Klaasen!! Indian lose an early wicket and it's the in-form Rohit Sharma! This is exactly what South Africa would've wanted! Tossed up full on off-stump, Rohit leant across and swept it hard, timed it well but did not keep it down and it went straight to Klaasen at backward square leg. He moved to his left and took it fairly low, good catch and South Africa are absolutely delighted. Things have gone to plan.

Flies towards long-off and was going over but Surya appears out of nowhere to pluck it out as he moves to his left, and then juggle it up as he was going over the ropes. Had the feet millimetres away from the cushions too, did well not to step on it, lobs it back in as he goes out, comes back in, steadies himself and completes the catch.

full_text: Axar to Tristan Stubbs, Bowled!! This is a gift from Tristan Stubbs. Lucky wicket for India and Axar. full_text: Bumrah to Reeza Hendricks, Bowled!! ! The coaches and experts often keep telling batters about Bumrah's cunning angle and how it's tough to play him with that wide angle. But he's bowling some lovely genuine outswingers too to make life hell for batters and this is an unplayable ball. I was definitely not expecting it to swing from Bumrah kind of reaction to that ball from Reeza. Length and moving away very late, squaring up the batter and hitting top of off. One of the most satisfying feelings for a pacer, more so if you make the batter look clueless.
